headlines.summary: Malaysia is looking to diversify its crude sourcing with supply from the U.S., South America, and Africa as the Hormuz crisis has choked off its key Middle Eastern deliveries, Malaysian Economy Minister Akmal Nasrullah Mohd Nasir said on Wednesday. headlines.title: UK Economy Set to Shrink as Iran Energy Shock Hits Growth
headlines.summary: The UK economy is expected to contract despite a boost at the start of the year, with economists warning that the war in Iran’s energy price shock will now show up in fresh data. headlines.title: EnQuest Bets $833 Million on Malaysia's Offshore Oil
headlines.summary: EnQuest PLC has agreed to buy interests in four production sharing contracts offshore Malaysia from local state firm Petronas for up to $833 million, as the UK-based oil and gas producer bets on growth opportunities in Southeast Asia. headlines.title: U.S. Oil Inventories Continue Slide as Refiners Boost Runs
headlines.summary: Crude oil inventories in the United States decreased by 7.2 million barrels during the week ending June 5, according to new data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) released on Wednesday. headlines.title: EU Moves Against Russian LNG Shipping As Arctic Gas Imports Surge
headlines.summary: Brussels is proposing new restrictions on Russia’s LNG shipping sector even as Europe remains the primary destination for Russian Arctic gas, receiving nearly 97% of Yamal Arctic LNG exports so far this year. headlines.title: KKR Eyes $6.7 Billion Takeover of Irish Energy Distributor DCC
